23.reason: [The sorting loop uses indices starting from 0 but the input was stored starting from index 1, causing uninitialized data (a[0]) to be used in sorting and processing. This leads to undefined behavior and incorrect results.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [The sorting loop uses indices starting from 0 but the input was stored starting from index 1, causing uninitialized data (a[0]) to be used in sorting and processing. This leads to undefined behavior and incorrect results.]

41.reason: [The algorithm only extends forward from each segment and does not consider backward extension (i.e., connecting segments that end at the current segment's start). Thus, it fails to find the true longest continuous chain when the maximum chain requires prepending segments.]
